connectionId.description: Optional id of an external data source (e.g. a Postgres, DuckDB, or MySQL direct-query connection). When set, runs the query against that source instead of the ClickHouse catalog. Use external-data-sources-list to discover available connection ids.

query.description: The final SQL query to be executed.

truncate.description: Whether to truncate large blob/JSON values in results. Defaults to true. Set to false when you need full untruncated results (e.g., for dumping to a file).
